texto: We do not have to know everything about something in order to understand it
autor: too many facts are often as much of an obstacle to understanding as too few.
explicacao: Orientação direta de too many facts are often as much of an obstacle to understanding as too few. sobre temas ligados a reflexao. A afirmação “We do not have to know everything about something in order to understand it” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a reflexao, mortimer-j-adler, everything, útil em momentos de reflexao.
